chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D-2881 of 2018 C.P. No.D-2882 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 11.08.2020 Mr. Hameedullah Dahri, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. Mr. Imdad Ali R. Unar, Advocate for the respondents No.5 and 6. == It appears from the record that these petitions were disposed off vide order dated 21.02.2019 with certain directions regarding to payment of pensionary benefits to the petitioners. Learned counsel for the respondents No.5 and 6 files a statement along-with photocopy of details of cheques which were handed over to the concerned parties, same is taken on record; copy whereof supplied to the learned counsel for the petitioners, who after going through the same submits that very purpose of filing contempt applications have finalized, therefore, seeks disposal of the same. Since the compliance of Court’s order dated 21.02.2019 has been made, therefore, under the circumstances all pending applications including contempt applications are disposed off as nothing is pending for adjudication, therefore, office is directed to consign the file to the record room. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish Steno*
